notes.value: per material: {min: cheapest city direct price, by: {city: direct}, by7: {city: 7d avg}, by30: {city: 30d avg}} or null when no order and no history exist anywhere
notes.buy_side: direct = sell_price_min = the live price you PAY to buy the material (cheapest standing sell order)
notes.averages: by7/by30 = volume-weighted mean of AODP daily history over 7/30 days; thinner coverage than direct, missing cities fall back to direct in the app
notes.null: faction / bound tokens and faction-cape blueprints are not market-traded; app must show 'cost n/a'
notes.staleness: AODP prices lag; latest_price_ts shows direct freshness, rebuild with baseline
